home.title: Multi-Function Online Toolbox
home.description: A one-stop online tool collection offering image processing, text sync, file transfer and more. Choose any tool below to get started.

imageSplitter.title: Image Grid Splitter
imageSplitter.description: Support 5x5 custom grid splitting with real-time preview export, making your social media images more creative.

clipboard.title: Encrypted Online Clipboard
clipboard.description: Password-based real-time text sync tool. Enter the same password to instantly transfer text between devices.

fileTransfer.title: Secure File Transfer
fileTransfer.description: Point-to-point file transfer via extraction code. Support encrypted upload, privacy protection, and auto-destroy on expiry.

imageSplitter.title: Image Grid Splitter - Free Online Image Cutter
imageSplitter.description: Choose split style, upload image, preview results in real-time. Local processing, data stays safe.
imageSplitter.seoKeywords: image splitter,grid cutter,image grid,photo splitter,instagram grid,nine grid,free image tool
imageSplitter.gridHint: Click grid cells to select regions to split. Selected regions will be highlighted in purple.
imageSplitter.splitSuccess: ✓ Split complete! Right-click images to download

clipboard.title: Cross-Device Cloud Clipboard - E2EE
clipboard.description: Secure, real-time cross-platform text synchronization tool. End-to-end encryption with keys stored locally only.
clipboard.seoKeywords: cloud clipboard,cross-device clipboard,online clipboard,text sync,end-to-end encryption,cross-platform transfer
clipboard.encryptionNote: All messages are encrypted and only visible in channels with the same password
clipboard.invalidKey: Invalid key format, only letters and numbers are allowed
clipboard.connectionError: Connection failed, please check network or try again later
clipboard.sendFailed: Failed to send, please try again
clipboard.toolDesc: Real-time communication based on WebSocket, supporting encrypted key transmission and multi-client message forwarding. A secure and reliable multi-device text transfer solution.
